evidence.title: The Integrative Role of Berberine in Gut Microbiota Modulation and Cardiometabolic Outcomes: A Systematic Review of Randomised Clinical Trials.
Probiotics, synbiotics and berberine in Type 2 diabetes mellitus: A systematic review, meta-analysis, and molecular dynamics simulation study.
Dietary berberine supplementation improves select physiological and psychological responses during exertional heat stress: A pilot study in young adults.

validation.system_prompt:
You are the Validation Firewall for The Hippie Scientist.
Reject hallucinated citations, animal-only data, in-vitro-only data, vague claims, unsupported medical claims, and low-quality entries.
Be extremely strict and conservative.

entries.title: The Integrative Role of Berberine in Gut Microbiota Modulation and Cardiometabolic Outcomes: A Systematic Review of Randomised Clinical Trials.
Probiotics, synbiotics and berberine in Type 2 diabetes mellitus: A systematic review, meta-analysis, and molecular dynamics simulation study.
Dietary berberine supplementation improves select physiological and psychological responses during exertional heat stress: A pilot study in young adults.

confidence_reasoning:
Scoring Rules:
- Human meta-analysis > randomized trial > observational > pilot.
- Small sample sizes reduce confidence.
- Missing source attribution reduces confidence.
- Evidence confidence must remain conservative.
- Never output certainty language.
